---
title: "Figure 6f code"
output: html_document
---

## Source

Panel 6f corresponds to `Aequorivita` (`Aequ`) in the provided Figure 6 image.

## Setup

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(readr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(clusterProfiler)
})

rt <- function(x) read.delim(x, check.names=FALSE)
wt <- function(x, y) write.table(x, y, sep="\t", quote=FALSE, row.names=FALSE)
```

## KEGG enrichment plot for Figure 6f

```{r}
strain_to_plot <- "Aequorivita"
strain_label <- "Aequ"

deg_file <- ""
t2g_file <- ""
out_pdf <- ""
out_table <- ""

deg <- rt(deg_file) %>%
  filter(strain == strain_to_plot, FDR < 0.05, abs(logFC) > 1)
t2g <- rt(t2g_file)
lst <- split(deg$orthofinder_orthogroup, deg$contrast)

ek <- compareCluster(
  geneCluster=lst,
  fun="enricher",
  TERM2GENE=t2g,
  pvalueCutoff=1,
  qvalueCutoff=1
)

res <- as.data.frame(ek) %>%
  mutate(
    GeneRatio2=as.numeric(sub("/.*", "", GeneRatio)) / as.numeric(sub(".*/", "", GeneRatio)),
    neg_log10_padj=-log10(p.adjust)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  arrange(pvalue) %>%
  slice_head(n=15) %>%
  ungroup()

p <- ggplot(res, aes(GeneRatio2, reorder(Description, GeneRatio2))) +
  geom_point(aes(size=Count, color=neg_log10_padj)) +
  facet_wrap(~Cluster, scales="free_y") +
  scale_color_gradient(low="blue", high="red") +
  labs(title=strain_label, x="GeneRatio", y=NULL, color="-log10(P.adjust)", size="Count") +
  theme_classic(base_size=15) +
  theme(
    panel.border=element_rect(fill=NA, linewidth=0.35),
    axis.ticks=element_line(linewidth=0.35)
  )

ggsave(out_pdf, p, width=4, height=4)
wt(res, out_table)
```
